subteams.name: Logistics
subteams.description: The backbone of every event. Our logistics team ensures everything runs smoothly, from setup to cleanup.

members.name: Team Member
members.quote: Service to others is the rent you pay for your room here on earth.

subteams.name: Outreach
subteams.description: Connecting with the community and spreading the message of Jumu'ah through various channels.

members.name: Team Member
members.quote: Building bridges, one connection at a time.

subteams.name: Content
subteams.description: Creating meaningful content that inspires and educates our community.

members.name: Team Member
members.quote: Words have power. We use ours to uplift and inspire.

subteams.name: Janitors
subteams.description: The heart of our team. Janitors are dedicated volunteers who serve the community with humility and dedication, ensuring our space is welcoming and clean for everyone.

members.name: Team Member
members.quote: Service is not about recognition; it's about making a difference.

mission: Being a 'Janitor' means serving the community with humility, dedication, and love. It's about recognizing that every role, no matter how small it may seem, is essential to building a thriving Muslim community at Rutgers.
